key.name: import-remember
key.description: When true, gboop stores import credentials for shared shell dialogs.

key.name: import-email
key.description: Email used for shared shell import dialogs when remember is enabled.

key.name: import-password
key.description: Password used for shared shell import dialogs when remember is enabled.

key.name: sgf-last-folder
key.description: Most recently used folder for loading and saving SGF files.

key.name: puzzle-user-id
key.description: Stable locally generated identifier for shared shell progress uploads.

key.name: send-puzzle-usage-data
key.description: When true, the shared shell may upload anonymized puzzle usage data.

key.name: send-application-usage-data
key.description: When true, the shared shell may upload anonymized application usage data.

key.name: privacy-settings-shown
key.description: Whether the privacy settings dialog has already been shown to the user.
